case_title: LEE, BUM JOO VS PRIDE, ANTHONY CORNELL et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY LEE, BUM JOO AS TO DEFENDANT PRIDE, ANTHONY CORNELL LITTON, TOM DBA SELF STORAGE 1 ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-12-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, BUM JOO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRIDE, ANTHONY CORNELL LITTON, TOM DBA SELF STORAGE 1 $650.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $676.00, NO SERVICE ON LITTON, TOM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, BUM JOO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRIDE, ANTHONY CORNELL LITTON, TOM DBA SELF STORAGE 1 $293.98 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $319.98, DEFENDANT'S NAME IS AMENDED TO: ANTHONY CORNELL PRIDE. TOM LITTON DBA SELF STORAGE 1 IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE-NO PROOF OF SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERTFD.MAIL TO TOM LITTON RETURNED UNCLAIMED;
D.M.V. CERTIFICATE OF FACTS RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PRIDE, ANTHONY CORNELL HEARING SET FOR OCT-19-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-19-2001, GRANTED
